case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. CARLOS GUTIERREZ et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: 1. REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT 2.COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS 3. INTEREST WAIVED 4. WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $239.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT GUTIERREZ, CARLOS
DECLARATION RE; COMPLIANCE WITH CCP SECTION 1033 (B) (2) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT GUTIERREZ, CARLOS DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-20-2010
